settings.text: Tamanna Miglani, a Graduate student from the Brunel University, London as well as a fashion diploma student from Central Saint Martin’s, London. She initiated the notion of this brand at the age of 22 and her soul vision is to propose the idea of affordable luxury through her eye-catching and splendid collection of wearables. Luring the empowering divas to lead their ways into the fashion closet through her adaptable collection is what she aims at.
